economic_notes: Convenience Store and VLT/casino income are significant own-source revenues. Economic Development Program expenditures were $6,869,189 in 2024 vs $3,318,592 in 2023, suggesting major economic development activity.
notes: Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($22,925,737) + Health Canada/opening def.rev. ($3,106,168) + CMHC ($463,676) + Wolastoqey Tribal Council ($383,292) + Fisheries and Oceans Canada ($390,074) = $27,268,947. OSR includes Convenience Store, VLT/casino, rental income, and other revenues. Prior year expenses calculated as total expenditures $47,243,780 + amortization $1,660,550 = $48,904,330. Current liabilities = accounts payable and accrued liabilities ($2,020,681) + accounts payable ISC ($443,735). Schedules of remuneration (pages 38-39) not provided in document images. Economic Development Program nearly doubled year-over-year.
